title: TCR Explorer: federated T cell receptor analysis with germline assignment, reconstruction, and tcrdist similarity
description: TCR Explorer retrieves T cell receptor records from public databases (VDJdb, IEDB, McPAS, TCR3d), assigns germline V and J alleles from the IMGT reference, reconstructs full chain sequences, builds evidence dossiers, and scores single-chain and paired sequence similarity with the authoritative tcrdist metric (with a BLOSUM fallback). The same pure functions are exposed through a web UI, a REST API, and a Model Context Protocol server. The design is honesty-first: deposited sequences are returned verbatim, reconstructions are tagged, a bare CDR3 never yields a V allele, and ambiguous calls report ties.

creators.name: Maire, Kilian
creators.affiliation: Department of Immunology and Microbiology, LEO Foundation Skin Immunology Research Center, University of Copenhagen, Denmark
